test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to tax configuration page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Tax Configuration'
expected_result: Tax configuration page loads successfully; Page displays the current active tax configuration if one exists or shows an empty state with a prompt to create the first config; 'Add Tax Config' or 'Create Configuration' button is visible

test_desc: Smoke - Create first active tax configuration
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Click 'Add Tax Config' button; Fill ratePercent field with '11'; Fill effectiveDate field with '2026-01-01'; Select calcMode dropdown value 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: New tax configuration is created successfully; Success notification appears; Configuration displays with ratePercent=11, effectiveDate=2026-01-01, calcMode='inclusive', status='active'; This is now the current active tax configuration

test_desc: Smoke - View active tax configuration details
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Locate the active tax configuration row in the list; Click on the row or click 'View' action button
expected_result: Tax configuration detail view opens; All fields display correctly: ratePercent=11, effectiveDate='2026-01-01', calcMode='inclusive', status='active'; Edit button is visible

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create new config triggering automatic historical migration
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Verify the existing active config shows ratePercent=11 with status='active'; Click 'Add Tax Config' button; Fill ratePercent field with '12'; Fill effectiveDate field with '2026-04-01'; Select calcMode dropdown value 'exclusive'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification; Navigate back to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Inspect both configurations in the list
expected_result: New tax configuration is created with ratePercent=12, effectiveDate='2026-04-01', calcMode='exclusive', status='active'; The previous configuration (ratePercent=11) is automatically migrated to status='historical'; Only one configuration has status='active' at any time; The historical config retains all its original data but with status changed to 'historical'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Verify active config prominently displayed
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Observe the page layout and how configs are displayed
expected_result: The active configuration (ratePercent=12, calcMode='exclusive') is prominently displayed, either at the top of the list or in a highlighted/featured section; Historical configurations are listed separately or visually distinguished from the active one; Status badges clearly differentiate 'active' from 'historical'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Edit active tax configuration
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Locate the active configuration (ratePercent=12); Click 'Edit' action button; Change calcMode from 'exclusive' to 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification; Verify updated data in the list
expected_result: Active configuration is updated successfully; calcMode now shows 'inclusive'; ratePercent remains '12'; effectiveDate remains '2026-04-01'; Status remains 'active'; Success notification appears

test_desc: Edge Case - Invalid rate percent values
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Click 'Add Tax Config' button; Fill ratePercent field with '-5'; Fill effectiveDate with '2026-06-01'; Select calcMode 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Observe error; Clear form; Fill ratePercent field with '150'; Fill effectiveDate with '2026-06-01'; Select calcMode 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Observe error; Clear form; Fill ratePercent field with 'abc'; Fill effectiveDate with '2026-06-01'; Select calcMode 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Observe error
expected_result: All three submissions are rejected: negative value (-5) shows validation error 'Rate must be a positive number' or similar; excessively high value (150) shows validation error 'Rate exceeds maximum allowed percentage' or similar; non-numeric value ('abc') shows validation error 'Rate must be a valid number' or similar; No invalid configurations are created

test_desc: Edge Case - Effective date in the past and missing required fields
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Click 'Add Tax Config' button; Fill ratePercent field with '10'; Fill effectiveDate field with '2020-01-01' (past date); Select calcMode 'inclusive'; Click Submit button; Observe result; Then clear the form; Leave ratePercent empty; Leave effectiveDate empty; Leave calcMode unselected; Click Submit button; Observe result
expected_result: Past date submission: Either rejected with a warning that the effective date is in the past, or accepted with a note (depends on business rule); Empty form submission: Rejected with validation errors for all required fields - ratePercent, effectiveDate, and calcMode are all flagged as required; No invalid configuration is created from the empty submission
